name: player_fantasy_points_from_plays year+week split yields per-week values, not the season total (executed-result parity)
description: Regression guard for the week-split bug where the fantasy-points stat CTE was grouped/joined by year only, so every per-week row showed the full-season total. Seed one player (pos ZZ) with rushing plays in two different weeks of 2023 (50 yds week 1, 80 yds week 2). With a year+week split the data-view must return one row per week with that week's points (5.00, 8.00) -- the pre-fix code returned the season total (13.00) repeated at every week, which the oracle's per-week GROUP BY would not match. Path-agnostic: asserts executed values, so it guards both the legacy with-builder and the aggregator path regardless of which generates the SQL.

seed: INSERT INTO player (pid, first_name, last_name, short_name, formatted_name, primary_position, secondary_position, date_of_birth, nfl_draft_year, current_nfl_team) VALUES ('TEST-FPWK-000903','Test','Fpwk','T.Fpwk','Test Fpwk','ZZ','ZZ','2000-01-01',2020,'ZZ')
INSERT INTO nfl_games (esbid, year, week, seas_type, v, h) VALUES (992001, 2023, 1, 'REG', 'ZZ', 'OP')
INSERT INTO nfl_games (esbid, year, week, seas_type, v, h) VALUES (992002, 2023, 2, 'REG', 'ZZ', 'OP')
INSERT INTO nfl_plays (esbid, "playId", year, week, updated, seas_type, play_type, off, bc_pid, rush_yds) VALUES (992001, 1, 2023, 1, 0, 'REG', 'RUSH', 'ZZ', 'TEST-FPWK-000903', 50)
INSERT INTO nfl_plays (esbid, "playId", year, week, updated, seas_type, play_type, off, bc_pid, rush_yds) VALUES (992002, 1, 2023, 2, 0, 'REG', 'RUSH', 'ZZ', 'TEST-FPWK-000903', 80)
result_equivalence.reference_sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(rush_yds,0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(rush_td::int,0) * 6), 2) AS fantasy_points_from_plays_0 FROM nfl_plays WHERE bc_pid='TEST-FPWK-000903' AND year IN (2023) AND seas_type='REG' AND play_type <> 'NOPL' GROUP BY week

expected_query:
with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2023]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years WHERE player.primary_position IN ('ZZ')), "player_years_weeks" as (SELECT player_years.pid, nfl_year_week_timestamp.year, nfl_year_week_timestamp.week FROM player_years INNER JOIN nfl_year_week_timestamp ON player_years.year = nfl_year_week_timestamp.year WHERE nfl_year_week_timestamp.year = 2023), "t4590257d3227cc6343df566e2bba7128" as materialized (with "filtered_plays" as (select "nfl_plays"."bc_pid", "nfl_plays"."psr_pid", "nfl_plays"."trg_pid", "nfl_plays"."player_fuml_pid", "nfl_plays"."week", "nfl_plays"."seas_type", "nfl_plays"."year", "nfl_plays"."rush_yds", "nfl_plays"."rush_td", "nfl_plays"."pass_yds", "nfl_plays"."pass_td", "nfl_plays"."recv_yds", "nfl_plays"."comp", "nfl_plays"."int", "nfl_plays"."first_down", "nfl_plays"."play_type", "nfl_plays"."fuml" from "nfl_plays" where "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL') and ("nfl_plays"."bc_pid" is not null or "nfl_plays"."psr_pid" is not null or "nfl_plays"."trg_pid" is not null or "nfl_plays"."player_fuml_pid" is not null) and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023)) select "pid", SUM(fantasy_points_from_plays) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year", "week" from (select * from (select "bc_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(rush_yds, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(rush_td::int, 0) * 6), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year", "week" from "filtered_plays" where "bc_pid" is not null group by "bc_pid", "seas_type", "year", "week") as "bc_stats" union all select * from (select "psr_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(pass_yds, 0) * 0.04 + COALESCE(pass_td::int, 0) * 4 + COALESCE("int"::int, 0) * -1), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year", "week" from "filtered_plays" where "psr_pid" is not null group by "psr_pid", "seas_type", "year", "week") as "psr_stats" union all select * from (select "trg_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(recv_yds, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(pass_td::int, 0) * 6 + COALESCE(comp::int, 0) * 1), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year", "week" from "filtered_plays" where "trg_pid" is not null group by "trg_pid", "seas_type", "year", "week") as "trg_stats" union all select * from (select "player_fuml_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(-1), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year", "week" from "filtered_plays" where "player_fuml_pid" is not null group by "player_fuml_pid", "seas_type", "year", "week") as "fuml_stats") as "combined_stats" group by "pid", "seas_type", "year", "week" having SUM(fantasy_points_from_plays) > 0), "player_participation_weeks" as (SELECT pid, year, week, bool_or(active) AS active
          FROM (SELECT pgl.pid, 2023::int AS year, g.week, pgl.active
       FROM player_gamelogs_year_2023 pgl
       INNER JOIN nfl_games g ON g.esbid = pgl.esbid
       WHERE g.seas_type = 'REG' AND g.year = 2023) src
          GROUP BY pid, year, week), "player_years_teams" as (SELECT pid, year, array_agg(DISTINCT team_code) AS teams
          FROM (SELECT pgl.pid, 2023::int AS year, pgl.nfl_team AS team_code
       FROM player_gamelogs_year_2023 pgl
       INNER JOIN nfl_games g ON g.esbid = pgl.esbid
       WHERE pgl.active = TRUE AND g.seas_type = 'REG' AND g.year = 2023) src
          GROUP BY pid, year), "team_weeks_played" as (select distinct "team", "year", "week" from ((select "h" as "team", "year", "week" from "nfl_games" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2023)) union all (select "v" as "team", "year", "week" from "nfl_games" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2023))) as "g") select "t4590257d3227cc6343df566e2bba7128"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, "t4590257d3227cc6343df566e2bba7128"."fantasy_points_from_plays" AS "fantasy_points_from_plays_0", "t4590257d3227cc6343df566e2bba7128"."year", "t4590257d3227cc6343df566e2bba7128"."week", CASE
     WHEN player_participation_weeks.active THEN 'active'
     WHEN player_participation_weeks.pid IS NULL
          AND player_years_teams.teams IS NOT NULL
          AND NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM team_weeks_played
            WHERE team_weeks_played.year = t4590257d3227cc6343df566e2bba7128.year
              AND team_weeks_played.week = t4590257d3227cc6343df566e2bba7128.week
              AND team_weeks_played.team = ANY(player_years_teams.teams)
          )
       THEN 'bye'
     ELSE NULL
   END AS participation_status, "player"."primary_position" from "t4590257d3227cc6343df566e2bba7128" inner join "player" on "player"."pid" = "t4590257d3227cc6343df566e2bba7128"."pid" left join "player_participation_weeks" on "player_participation_weeks"."pid" = "t4590257d3227cc6343df566e2bba7128"."pid" and "player_participation_weeks"."year" = "t4590257d3227cc6343df566e2bba7128"."year" and "player_participation_weeks"."week" = "t4590257d3227cc6343df566e2bba7128"."week" left join "player_years_teams" on "player_years_teams"."pid" = "t4590257d3227cc6343df566e2bba7128"."pid" and "player_years_teams"."year" = "t4590257d3227cc6343df566e2bba7128"."year" where player.primary_position IN ('ZZ') group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "t4590257d3227cc6343df566e2bba7128"."fantasy_points_from_plays", "t4590257d3227cc6343df566e2bba7128"."year", "t4590257d3227cc6343df566e2bba7128"."week", CASE
     WHEN player_participation_weeks.active THEN 'active'
     WHEN player_participation_weeks.pid IS NULL
          AND player_years_teams.teams IS NOT NULL
          AND NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM team_weeks_played
            WHERE team_weeks_played.year = t4590257d3227cc6343df566e2bba7128.year
              AND team_weeks_played.week = t4590257d3227cc6343df566e2bba7128.week
              AND team_weeks_played.team = ANY(player_years_teams.teams)
          )
       THEN 'bye'
     ELSE NULL
   END, "t4590257d3227cc6343df566e2bba7128"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by 4 DESC NULLS LAST, "t4590257d3227cc6343df566e2bba7128"."pid" asc limit 500
